core_principles.zh: 玩法与叙事统一——卡牌表达角色身份，而非单纯数值
core_principles.en: Unify gameplay and narrative — cards express character identity, not just numbers
core_principles.source_quote: 1. Unify gameplay and narrative — cards express character identity, not just numbers

core_principles.zh: 每个选择都有意义——每种队伍配置、遗物、出牌顺序都应创造独特策略权衡
core_principles.en: Make every choice meaningful — every team comp, relic, card order should create distinct strategic trade-offs
core_principles.source_quote: 2. Make every choice meaningful — every team comp, relic, card order should create distinct strategic trade-offs

core_principles.zh: 只增强不削弱（尽可能）——抽卡是服务承诺；不得不削弱时提供退还机制
core_principles.en: Buffs only, no nerfs (as much as possible) — gacha is a service commitment; if nerf unavoidable, provide refund mechanism
core_principles.source_quote: 3. Buffs only, no nerfs (as much as possible) — gacha is a service commitment; if nerf unavoidable, provide refund mechanism

cut_mechanics.concept: Would shift based on exploration choices, granting dangerous but powerful abilities in final phase
why_cut: Cognitive burden too high with existing systems
Stage length too variable for granularity
Character identity mismatch — Keeper chooses to face the indescribable, shouldn't be frequently broken

original_vision.description: Narrative focused on campus life, repeated Domain exploration, gradual truth discovery; detailed Mythag University environments; Awakeners only determine starting cards which transform into variants during battle; realm-universal cards collectible during exploration
key_differences_from_current: Campus life narrative removed — refocused from investigation to combat when Light joined in 2021
Repeated Domain exploration removed — high co-design difficulty, low reusability, limited meaningful branching
Realm-universal collectible cards during exploration removed

balance_philosophy.principle: Buffs only, no nerfs (as much as possible)
balance_philosophy.details: Gacha is a service commitment to players. If a character must be adjusted downward, use environment adjustment (enemy mechanics, stage design) rather than direct stat nerfs
balance_philosophy.refund_mechanism: When nerfs are unavoidable, provide refund mechanism so players don't feel cheated
balance_philosophy.first_year_lesson: First year nerfs caused poor experience; later reverted some. Too casual community communication amplified criticism during monetization adjustments

monetization_philosophy.gacha_stance: Not defending the model itself; explaining specific choices within it — pragmatic choice, not soul of the game
admitted_mistakes: Enlighten/Wheel duplicate requirements set too high initially
Over-Exaltation, extra level caps, Final Axiom added later created psychological burden
First year nerfs caused poor experience; later reverted some
Too casual community communication in year 1 led to amplified criticism during monetization adjustments
player_friendly_measures: Monthly exchangeable universal special materials (Pure Cores)
Removed Normal Mode emergency gnosis restriction
Almost no truly permanently unavailable core content
Refund mechanism when nerfs are unavoidable
monetization_philosophy.future_direction: Increase free benefits per major version; more chances to obtain previously limited content; convenience and stress-reducing features; optimize duplicate overflow rewards

character_design_cases.zh_summary: 四生态位压缩、不划算但为叙事服务、'为理想燃烧一次'
character_design_cases.en_summary: Compresses four character niches into one unit to serve 'split personality' narrative. Not commercially cost-effective. Battle designers 'burned once for their ideals'
character_design_cases.design_intent: Dual-form switching, four-realm compatibility, special record 'split then rediscover' resonance mechanism — all serving narrative
character_design_cases.no_more_like_this: No plan to create another multi-realm Awakener unless narrative demands it

character_design_cases.zh_summary: Light亲手设计技能、复制上回合卡牌=从过去经历获得力量
character_design_cases.en_summary: Skill set personally designed by producer Light. Core ability: replicate last played card = drawing strength from past experiences
character_design_cases.v11_pv_line: No matter how many times I fail, I will ultimately save you

character_design_cases.zh_summary: 原版故事已完整导致拓展空间有限、最终方案：神母外表是自我保护伪装
character_design_cases.en_summary: Original Murphy's story already complete, limited expansion room. Solution: Divine Mother facade hiding pure inner self
character_design_cases.design_challenge: Most difficult to write recently — need to maintain strong identity without damaging original's charm

character_design_cases.zh_summary: 第一个打击流角色，从角色人设自然推导而非刻意添加流派
character_design_cases.en_summary: First strike-flow character. Not designed because the game needed a strike archetype, but because Lotan's abilities and personality naturally suited it
character_design_cases.design_principle: Embodies 'unify gameplay and narrative' — gameplay feel derived from character identity

character_design_cases.zh_summary: 与萝坦有'宿命感'，成为第二个打击流角色
character_design_cases.en_summary: Has 'fated connection' with Lotan, became the second strike-flow character
character_design_cases.note: Originally planned for a more important role in Arc 1 (as was Herbert)

character_design_cases.zh_summary: 因与希洛的能力来源设定而具备打击能力，'忍耐'机制对应忍耐痛苦的经历
character_design_cases.en_summary: Has strike capabilities due to shared ability origin with Helot. 'Endurance' mechanic mirrors her experience of enduring pain
character_design_cases.design_chain: Lotan → Helot → Lily: strike-flow characters derived from character narratives, not archetype planning

character_design_cases.zh_summary_faction: 属于利莫里亚阵营但墨菲不属于，阵营加成设计对应她们各自对利莫里亚的态度差异
character_design_cases.en_summary_faction: Belongs to Lemuria faction but Murphy does not — faction bonus design reflects their different attitudes toward Lemuria
